description: Session and sign-in tools a site maps bindings to.

reachable.description: Report whether the site is reachable.
True if the site loaded and looks operable.

detail.description: Optional note about the site's state.

session.description: Report whether the user is signed in and whether a two-factor prompt is waiting.

active.description: True if a user is currently signed in.

mfaPending.description: True if a two-factor prompt is waiting for the user's code.

login.description: Sign in with the user's credentials.

accountId.description: The username or account id to sign in with.

passcode.description: The secret to sign in with, password, PIN, or similar.

groupId.description: Tenant or organization id, for multi-tenant sites.

success.description: True if the sign-in was submitted; call session to confirm it took.

errors.message: The sign-in page or form wasn't found; retry, or call reachable to check the site is up.

success.description: True if the session was ended.

mfaStatus.description: Report the pending two-factor challenge and which step the user is on.

pending.description: True if a two-factor challenge is on screen.

step.description: Which step the user is on: send the code or enter it.
